# review git_flow_jira

Review:
- `git flow` -> `git issue`
- `progress = !git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --force-with-lease mirror $branch`
  - mirror
  - push
  - `git progress` -> ...
- `ready = commit --amend`
  - `git ready` -> `git progress`
